positive: A cottagecore-style watercolor illustration of a picnic basket set among wildflowers and delicate foliage. Include small details like a ribbon, a loaf of rustic bread, and a vintage teacup. Soft, natural light, pastel tones, highly textured watercolor effect, romantic and gentle mood.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, harsh outlines, neon, industrial, modern
